data.title: Add RED structural tests for re-run idempotency to test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
data.description:
## What
Add 3 new RED structural boundary test functions to tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh for re-run idempotency story.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh (add 3 test functions + update header count)
- .test-index (append 3 RED marker lines)

## TDD Requirement
testing_mode: RED
New tests will FAIL until 018f-a01a Task 2 adds Phase 0 Step 5 and Phase 2.9 to SKILL.md.
TDD exemption: structural boundary tests (Rule 5 — non-executable LLM instruction file).

## Tests to Add (insert before print_summary)

test_artifact_detection: grep -qiE 'artifact.*detection|detect.*artifact' SKILL.md
test_append_only_merge: grep -qiE 'append.only|append-only' SKILL.md
test_idempotency: grep -qiE 'idempotent|idempotency' SKILL.md

## Header Update
Run: count=$(grep -c '^test_.*().*{' tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh)
Update the 'Validates (N named assertions)' header line to reflect the new count.

## .test-index Entries to Append (standalone RED markers)
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_artifact_detection]
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_append_only_merge]
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_idempotency]

## Verification
Run bash tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh — the 3 new tests must FAIL, all previous tests must PASS.
